text:
Market today: Mixed/cautious mood. The big driver for your book is headline #9 — a widening gap between Big Tech and semis is flashing a warning signal. That hits your chip-heavy names directly. Add a general bear-market signal (67% odds per one indicator) and the tape feels fragile for high-beta tech on margin.

Your holdings: AVGO (-14.66%, your largest position) is flagged TRIM — you're already underwater and size makes this your biggest risk. PLTR (-11.08%) is flagged SELL — losing money and momentum. Both hurt extra on margin. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with thin data — treat it like live ammo, not a core hold.

Watch: 1) Whether semis (SMH) hold above $631 — a break lower confirms the Big Tech/semis divergence warning and pressures your whole book. 2) PLTR and AVGO for any bounce to reduce at better prices.

Bottom line: Your two biggest losers are flagged for action — margin means you can't afford to wait for a recovery that may not come.
